SELECT 
    p.segment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END) AS products_2020,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2021' THEN w.id END) AS products_2021,
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2021' THEN w.id END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END), 0) AS pct_increase
FROM hardware_dim_product p
JOIN web_orders w ON p.pr...

    p.segment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END) AS product_count_2020
FROM hardware_dim_product p
JOIN web_orders w ON p.product_code = w.id  -- Assumed relationship for demonstration
GROUP BY p.segment

     COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END)) * 1.0 /

SELECT 
    p.segment,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END) AS products_2020,
    COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2021' THEN w.id END) AS products_2021,
    CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2021' THEN w.id END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / 
        NULLIF(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN w.id END), 0) AS pct_increase
FROM hardware_dim_product p
JOIN web_orders w ON p.pr...

WITH product_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        p.segment,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2020' THEN p.product_code END) AS count_2020,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN strftime('%Y', w.occurred_at) = '2021' THEN p.product_code END) AS count_2021
    FROM hardware_dim_product p
    LEFT JOIN web_orders w ON p.product_code = w.id
    GROUP BY p.segment
)
SELECT 
    segment,
    count_2020 AS product_count_2020
FROM product_counts
WHERE count_2020 > 0
ORDER BY 
   ...
